prompt: A cinematic food advertisement featuring a red and white striped paper chicken bucket overflowing with golden crispy fried chicken pieces, photographed against a deep dark red background with dramatic studio lighting. The bucket is centered in frame, filled to overflowing with heavily textured, crunchy golden-brown fried chicken pieces that are exploding and floating upward into the air. Scattered around the scene are vibrant red, pink, and white confetti pieces and small golden fried chicken crumbs falling and floating in all directions. The background is a rich dark crimson red with a soft warm spotlight glowing from behind and above, creating a theatrical bokeh atmosphere. The surface below shows scattered crumbs and confetti with a subtle red reflective ground. Hyper-realistic commercial food photography, explosive celebratory energy, high contrast dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field with motion blur on flying pieces, 8K ultra-detailed textures, vertical portrait format.
